rationale: All 7 implXxxFn seams default to the real production functions with matching signatures, verified by direct grep of each source: lifecycle.ScanOrphanedClosedBeads(specID, workdir, excludeBeadID string) ([]Orphan, error); lifecycle.ClosedEpicBeadIDs(specID string) ([]string, error); bead.WorktreeList() ([]WorktreeListEntry, error); gitutil.IsAncestor(workdir, ancestor, descendant string) (bool, error); gitutil.BranchExists(name string) bool (correctly bool-only, matching the fail-open C+B contract); bead.GetMetadata(issueID string) (map[string]interface{}, error); complete.CheckPendingObligations(beadID string, getMeta func(string) (map[string]interface{}, error)) error. implGetMetadataFn's signature exactly matches CheckPendingObligations's getMeta parameter type, and it is passed directly as implCheckObligationsFn(bid, implGetMetadataFn) at impl.go:608 -- approve wires its own bead.GetMetadata seam, never reaching into complete's internals. impl_test.go and orphan_gate_test.go save/restore and override all 7 vars hermetically with matching closure signatures. Import-edge check: `go list -deps ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/complete ./internal/gitutil` each grep -c internal/approve == 0 (all three exit 1 / no match), confirming acyclicity; approve already imported internal/bead pre-bead-2 (impl.go, plan.go, spec.go), so no new edge there. go build ./... and go vet ./internal/approve are clean. git status --porcelain shows only the new reviews/ scratch dir (untracked, expected); no source files modified.

findings.detail: All 7 implXxxFn vars match their real-function signatures exactly (verified via grep of internal/lifecycle/orphans.go, internal/bead/bdcli.go, internal/gitutil/gitops.go, internal/complete/panel_advisory.go).

implGetMetadataFn = bead.GetMetadata is passed as the getMeta func(string)(map[string]interface{}, error) argument to implCheckObligationsFn(bid, implGetMetadataFn) at impl.go:608; complete.CheckPendingObligations takes getMeta as an explicit parameter, so approve supplies its own reader rather than reaching into any complete-private function.
impl_test.go:414-434 (saveAndRestore) and orphan_gate_test.go (11 named tests) override all 7 vars with closures of the correct type; each test restores originals via defer.
go list -deps ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/complete ./internal/gitutil at 8b664359, grep internal/approve -> no match (exit 1) for all three.
impl.go/plan.go/spec.go already import internal/bead prior to Bead 2; bead.WorktreeList/GetMetadata add no new edge.
go build ./... and go vet ./internal/approve both clean.
git status --porcelain clean except the new untracked reviews/spec-115-bead2/ scratch dir created for this panel's own output; no source edits made.
